name: agent-collab-skills
description: Context-safe multi-agent collaboration skills for Claude Code: task splitter, context budget, output reconciler, debate, shared memory, acceptance gate. Composes with codex-delegate / gemini-delegate.

metadata.description: Practical skills for orchestrating Claude + Codex + Gemini on the same task without losing state, exploding context, missing conflicts, or merging unverified output.

plugins.name: agent-collab-workspace
plugins.description: 6 multi-agent collaboration skills auto-discovered from the source repo's skills/ subdirectory: agent-task-splitter, agent-context-budget, agent-output-reconciler, agent-debate, agent-shared-memory, agent-acceptance-gate.
